needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To bound the cardinality of the multiset of parts after mapping from Fin N.
To bound the cardinality after filtering zeros.
To know the cardinality of the domain of an NPartition.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Multiset.card (Multiset.map f s) = ∑ a in s.toFinset, Multiset.count a s
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Alternative way to compute cardinality of mapped multiset.
General lemma that filtering zeros does not change sum; may be in Mathlib as `Multiset.sum_filter_ne_zero` or similar.

needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: ∑ x in s, f x = (s.val.map f).sum
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: Used in `toPartition` to relate Finset sum to Multiset sum.
May be needed to prove antitone of the padded function if the original partition is decreasing.
